name: GH_TimeKind
summary: Enumerates the possible kinds that a System.DateTime value can imply.

enum_values.name: Mixed
enum_values.summary: Mixed indicates there isn't a single clear answer.

enum_values.name: PureTime
enum_values.summary: DateTime value implies a pure time (no date part).

enum_values.name: PureDate
enum_values.summary: DateTime value implies a pute date (no time part).

enum_values.name: DateAndTime
enum_values.summary: DateTime value implies both a date and a time component.
